description: A slogan graphic on a dark navy background. The top two-thirds is a photograph of President Trump in a dark suit, white shirt and red tie, speaking into a microphone at a lectern (a blurred 'THE HILL' event backdrop behind him). Across the middle in large white serif type is the slogan 'America is BACK!' ('America is' in italic, 'BACK!' in bold). Below the slogan are three torn-paper-style clipped news headlines, each tagged with an outlet logo, arranged as a collage: a NEWSMAX-branded clip reading 'WSJ Poll: Economic Optimism Surges 11 Points Under Trump, Recent Record'; a KXAN (NBC) clip reading 'Workforce training enrollment expected to spike in Central Texas with Pell Grant expansion'; and an AP-branded clip reading 'US applications for jobless benefits fall for sixth straight week, remain at historically low level'. No agency seal is visible.
notable_text: America is BACK!; WSJ Poll: Economic Optimism Surges 11 Points Under Trump; US applications for jobless benefits fall for sixth straight week, remain at historically low level
